name: Mugwort
description: An herb used in traditional medicine for its incredible soothing and antibacterial properties.
scientificSummary: Contains various essential oils and flavonoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and skin-healing effects.
mechanismOfAction: Relieves inflammation and helps detoxify the skin, providing a cooling and calming sensation.

seo.title: Mugwort - Ancient Soothing Ingredient | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the traditional and modern benefits of Mugwort for calming stressed skin.
